name: Sligo Town Cemetery

location.address: Cemetery Road / Pearse Road, Commons, Sligo, County Sligo, Ireland

historicGravesCoordinate.source: Historic Graves Sligo Old Cemetery page
historicGravesCoordinate.note: Use as a reference for the old cemetery survey area; verify against the exact trial entrance and boundary.

layoutNotes: Public heritage record describes the cemetery as laid out on a grid pattern.
Entrance is described from the public road to the west.
Ground falls from upper cemetery to lower cemetery.
Paths are described as bitmac paths with grassed areas and shrubs between graves.
User-supplied annotated screenshot identifies a main entrance marker at the north-west edge and draft grave blocks A, B and C in the north-east part of the cemetery.

sources.title: Buildings of Ireland: Sligo Cemetery, Pearse Road, Cemetery Road, Commons
IGP Archives: Sligo Town Cemetery
usedFor: Old, Middle and New section naming

sources.title: User annotated screenshot of Sligo Cemetery
sources.note: Treat as a visual tracing reference, not a measured survey.

nextDataNeeded: Council burial register export with grave reference, section, row, plot, burial names and dates.
At least 10 control-point graves with known grave references and GPS/photo confirmation.
